verification_notes: 18 holes, par 72, 6,793 yards confirmed. Year 1993 confirmed. Located Wang Noi, Ayutthaya (not Pathum Thani as pipeline notes suggested — Phahonyothin Km.58 is in Wang Noi district, Ayutthaya). Official website northernrangsit.com confirmed. Green fees 760–1,350 THB range (1golf.eu). Cart 800 THB. Specific weekday/weekend split from official site not captured; 760 weekday / 1,350 weekend used. Distinct from Rangsit Sports Club (separate course, separate province).
disputes: Pipeline notes placed this in 'Rangsit area, Pathum Thani' — all sources confirm it is in Wang Noi, Ayutthaya province (Phahonyothin Km.58), despite the 'Rangsit' name.
Green fee range 760–1,350 THB; exact weekday/weekend split not confirmed from official source.

prose.overview: Northern Rangsit Golf Club is a well-established public course that has served the northern Bangkok corridor since 1993, occupying a quiet position at Phahonyothin Kilometre 58 in Wang Noi, Ayutthaya — despite the 'Rangsit' name suggesting Pathum Thani, the club sits just across the provincial border in Ayutthaya territory. At 6,793 yards with a par 72, it is a full-length championship layout at a price point well below Bangkok's premium clubs. The course is a genuine value proposition: solid conditioning, experienced caddies, and an affordable fee structure attract regular local players and Bangkok day-trippers who want a proper 18-hole test without the expense or pretension of the region's destination resorts. The club has its own website (northernrangsit.com), a pro shop, restaurant, and full facilities — more than adequate for a comfortable round.
prose.layout_and_experience: The 18-hole layout runs 6,793 yards across flat Ayutthaya plains, routing through fairways lined with mature trees that channel shots and create strategic corridors. Water hazards feature throughout, demanding accurate mid-iron play into greens that are typically guarded at the front. The course has fairway carts available on request, though the relatively compact routing means walking is realistic for those inclined. Tee times are organised morning to night — weekday hours from 6 am, weekends from 5:30 am — reflecting genuine demand among golfers commuting from Bangkok. The caddies are well-versed in the course's subtleties, particularly the greens, which slope more than their flat appearance suggests. Evening rounds are possible, as the club is open until 8 pm daily.
prose.tips: Northern Rangsit offers a special promotion of 900 THB for green fee plus caddie after 11 am on most days — an excellent budget option for a midday round when the course quiets down. Early weekend tee times (5:30 am) are popular with local Bangkok golfers; book at least two days in advance. Reservations can be made up to 30 days ahead. Cart hire is available (800 THB shared) but optional. The 58-km drive from Bangkok via Phahonyothin Highway is simple and direct. Combine with a visit to the nearby ancient Ayutthaya temples for a full day out.
prose.location_and_access: Northern Rangsit Golf Club is located at 19/2 Moo 7, Phahonyothin Road Km. 58, Wang Noi, Ayutthaya 13170. It is approximately 58 km north of central Bangkok, around 70 minutes by car via Highway 1 (Phahonyothin Road). No public transport serves the club directly; taxi or Grab from Rangsit or Bang Pa-in is the best option.
prose.rental_cta_context: Northern Rangsit is excellent value on its own — pair it with LENGOLF club rentals delivered to your Bangkok hotel and you have a full championship round for a fraction of what Thailand's resort courses charge.
